name: @place-ts/data
description: Data primitives over @place-ts/reactivity. v0.1 ships a single primitive: collection<T>(state, options?) — keyed CRUD over a State<T[]> with reactive lookups + optional sorting. Replaces the hand-rolled CRUD shape that repeats per-entity in real apps.
author: Areeb

scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test
